name: Faceless Void
description: From a place beyond time, and time beyond counting.

abilities.name: Distortion Field
abilities.description: Grants an incoming ranged attack projectile slow aura that affects all allied heroes within the radius. The incoming ranged attack projectile slow only applies when the projectile itself is within the proximity radius. Aura Radius: 1200. Aura Linger Duration: 0.1. Proximity Radius: 500. Attack Projectile Speed Factor: 0.4.

abilities.name: Backtrack
abilities.description: Faceless Void has a chance to avoid damage entirely. Proc Chance: 20%.

abilities.name: Time Walk
abilities.description: Rushes to a target location while healing up from any damage taken in the last few seconds. Applies Time Lock of the corresponding level onto all units at the landing destination. Cast Range: Global. Max Travel Distance: 650/700/750/800 (775/825/875/925). Damage Taken to Self-Heal Factor: 1. Damage Timer: 2 (2.5). Effect Radius: (400). Number of Instances: (1). Cooldown: 21/16/11/6. Mana Cost: 40.

abilities.name: Time Dilation
abilities.description: The debuff first applies one instance of all ability components, then additionally applies a movement speed slow, attack speed slow, and deals damage per second per ability currently on cooldown. Increases the attack speed slow and movement speed slow applied. Radius: 775. Cooldown Rate Factor: 0.3/0.4/0.5/0.6. Duration: 7/8/9/10. Speed Slow per Stack: 4%/5%/6%/7% (0). Attack Speed Slow per Stack: 4/5/6/7 (0). Damage per Second per Stack: 4/6/8/10 (10/12/14/16). Cooldown: 28/24/20/16. Mana Cost: 90.

abilities.name: Time Lock
abilities.description: Adds a chance for an attack to lock an enemy unit in time while attacking it a second time. Proc Chance: 12%/16%/20%/24%. Damage: 18/22/26/30 (53/57/61/65). Second Attack Delay: 0.4. Instant Attack Factor: 1. Bash Duration: 0.5.

abilities.name: Chronosphere
abilities.description: When a rift opens to Claszureme, all poor souls caught within will likely never return. Cast Range: 500. Radius: 500 (640). Set Haste Speed: 1000. Duration: 3.75/4.25/4.75. Aura Linger Duration: 0.1. Attack Speed Bonus: (100). Cooldown: 155/145/135. Mana Cost: 125/200/275.
